chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.1059 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.1728/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.1729/2026 (Withdrawal) --------------------------------------------- 31.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Qasim, advocate along with applicant Mursaleen Khan Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh --------------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Applicant Mursaleen Khan son of Abdul Hameed has filed application, along with supporting affidavit, for withdrawal of instant criminal miscellaneous application. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh voluntarily appeared and has recorded no objection for withdrawal of instant criminal miscellaneous application. In view of such position, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications, if any. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
